org.moeaframework.core.fitness.IndicatorFitnessEvaluator

Packages that use IndicatorFitnessEvaluator
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.

    Method
    Description
    IndicatorFitnessEvaluator
    CMAES.getFitnessEvaluator()
    Returns the indicator-based fitness evaluator.
    IndicatorFitnessEvaluator

    Returns the indicator-based fitness evaluator.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm with parameters of type IndicatorFitnessEvaluator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CMAES.setFitnessEvaluator(IndicatorFitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator)
    Sets the indicator-based fitness evaluator used as a secondary comparison criteria for comparing population individuals with the same rank, or null to use the default crowding distance metric
    void
    IBEA.setFitnessEvaluator(IndicatorFitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator)
    Sets the indicator-based fitness evaluator.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CMAES(Problem problem, int lambda, IndicatorFitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator, NondominatedPopulation archive)
    Constructs a new CMA-ES instance using default parameters.
     
    CMAES(Problem problem, int lambda, IndicatorFitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator, NondominatedPopulation archive, double[] initialSearchPoint, boolean checkConsistency, double cc, double cs, double damps, double ccov, double ccovsep, double sigma, int diagonalIterations)
    Constructs a new CMA-ES instance with the given parameters.

    Constructs a new IBEA instance.
